data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) commits 50cc10735ee7 and 5a7347f889ce live on main, (2) all 5 tests pass, (3) max-iterations test (line 273) correctly drives 10 take-loop iterations hitting terminal-manager.ts:1224-1231, verifying logEnd(1,error), no 11th child spawn, and no spurious rollback, (4) single test file changed with 38 insertions/61 deletions, (5) no regressions. Prior rejection issue (test not exercising take-loop branch) is resolved.
